name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical data presented in statistical tables and graphs. Suitable for graduate and professional-level roles where numerical reasoning is critical.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to evaluate the logic of various kinds of argument and understand written passages. Designed for graduate and managerial-level candidates.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures inductive or abstract reasoning ability through identifying patterns in series of shapes. Predicts performance for roles requiring logical thinking and problem-solving.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to draw logical conclusions from a series of statements or premises. Ideal for roles requiring structured logical thinking.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures the ability to apply mechanical and physical principles in practical situations. Suitable for engineering, technical, and mechanical roles.

name: Verify Spatial Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to mentally manipulate shapes and understand spatial relationships. Relevant for design, engineering, and technical roles.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Tests numerical calculation ability including arithmetic, fractions, percentages, and ratios without a calculator. Suitable for clerical and data-entry roles.

name: Verify Checking
description: Measures speed and accuracy in checking tables of data. Ideal for administrative, data-entry, and clerical roles where accuracy is key.

name: Verify G+
description: A short, highly predictive adaptive measure of general cognitive ability (g) combining verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning. Ideal for high-volume hiring and any role requiring general intelligence.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: An interactive version of numerical reasoning testing with a more engaging, work-sample style interface. Suitable for graduate and professional hires.

name: Verify Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: An engaging interactive verbal reasoning assessment that presents realistic business-style passages. Ideal for roles requiring communication and language skills.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: An interactive format of inductive reasoning testing abstract pattern recognition. Good for roles requiring creative and analytical problem-solving.

name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r) measures 32 dimensions of work-relevant personality. It predicts leadership potential, teamwork, and performance across a wide range of roles. The most widely used personality assessment for occupational contexts worldwide.

name: MQ (Motivation Questionnaire)
description: The Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) assesses what conditions enhance or reduce an individual's motivation in the workplace. It covers 18 motivation dimensions including achievement, affiliation, and recognition.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF)
description: A competency-based interview tool measuring 20 universal competencies aligned to organizational effectiveness. Used for structured behavioural interviewing and development.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Java 8 programming concepts including lambda expressions, streams API, functional interfaces, and object-oriented principles. Designed for software developer roles.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming knowledge including data structures, OOP, standard libraries, and Pythonic coding practices. Suitable for data science and software engineering roles.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests proficiency in SQL including SELECT queries, JOINs, aggregations, subqueries, and database design concepts. Relevant for data analyst, DBA, and backend developer roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Evaluates JavaScript knowledge including DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, ES6+ features, closures, and frameworks. For frontend and full-stack developer roles.

name: C# (New)
description: Assesses C# programming knowledge including .NET framework, LINQ, async/await, generics, and OOP principles. Designed for .NET developer and software engineering roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Tests C++ knowledge including memory management, templates, STL, OOP, and modern C++ (C++11/14/17). For embedded systems, game development, and systems programming roles.

name: Technology Professional 8.0 - Solution Design
description: Measures competencies required for technology professionals involved in designing technical solutions. Covers architecture, systems thinking, and technical leadership.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Tests knowledge of Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, retrospectives, and agile best practices. Suitable for developers, project managers, and product owners.

name: Coding Simulation - Java
description: A hands-on coding simulation requiring candidates to write actual Java code in a realistic IDE environment. Evaluates practical coding skill, debugging, and problem-solving under real conditions.

name: Coding Simulation - Python
description: A live coding simulation where candidates write Python code to solve real-world problems in a simulated development environment.

name: Coding Simulation - JavaScript
description: A live coding simulation for JavaScript where candidates build or fix functionality in a realistic browser-based IDE.

name: Graduate 8.0 - Professional
description: A comprehensive ability assessment battery for graduate-level and early-career professional hiring. Combines verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning subtests calibrated for graduates.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Manager
description: Presents realistic managerial scenarios requiring the candidate to select the best response. Measures managerial judgement, decision-making, and leadership potential.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Customer Service
description: Measures situational judgement for customer-facing roles. Scenarios involve handling difficult customers, problem resolution, and service excellence.

name: Workplace English Assessment
description: Assesses English language proficiency in a workplace context including reading, writing, grammar, and comprehension. Ideal for roles where business-level English is required.

name: Contact Centre Customer Service
description: Tailored for call centre and contact centre hiring. Assesses verbal reasoning, data checking, and customer handling scenarios relevant to telephone-based customer service.

name: Retail Solution
description: Designed for retail hiring, measuring customer orientation, numerical skills, and situational judgement relevant to retail environments.

name: Financial Services Assessment
description: Assesses competencies and cognitive abilities specific to financial services roles including analytical thinking, attention to detail, and compliance orientation.

name: Sales Assessment
description: Evaluates sales aptitude, motivation, personality, and situational judgement for sales and business development roles. Covers prospecting, closing, and relationship-building behaviours.

name: Leadership Report (OPQ)
description: Uses OPQ32r results to generate a leadership-specific report covering 8 leadership dimensions. Identifies leadership strengths and derailers for senior leadership selection and development.

name: Team Impact Report (OPQ)
description: Derived from OPQ32r, provides insights into how an individual contributes to and impacts team dynamics across 9 Belbin-like team roles.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument
description: Measures attitudes and behaviours related to workplace safety, reliability, and rule compliance. Designed for operational, manufacturing, and safety-critical roles.

name: Short Form Verbal
description: A short-form verbal reasoning test suitable for volume recruitment where a quick measure of verbal ability is required. Assesses comprehension and logical reasoning from written passages.

name: Short Form Numerical
description: A brief numerical reasoning test for volume recruitment contexts. Measures ability to interpret numerical data quickly without extensive test administration.

name: Entry Level Sales 7.1 (International)
description: Designed for entry-level sales roles internationally. Combines basic cognitive ability and personality measures relevant to early-career sales performance.

name: Numerical Reasoning - Intermediate Level
description: An intermediate-level numerical reasoning test targeted at supervisory, technical, and junior management roles requiring moderate numerical analysis skills.

name: Verbal Reasoning - Intermediate Level
description: Measures verbal reasoning for intermediate-level roles including supervisory, administrative, and junior professional positions requiring written comprehension.

name: Workplace Personality Inventory (WPI)
description: A personality questionnaire measuring 21 personality scales relevant to occupational performance. Particularly suited for North American workplace contexts.

name: Generic Ability Assessment (GAAP)
description: Measures general cognitive ability through a combination of verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning items at various levels of difficulty. Suitable for a wide range of roles.

name: Raven's Progressive Matrices
description: A non-verbal test of abstract reasoning and fluid intelligence using pattern completion tasks. Culture-fair and language-independent, suitable for diverse candidate pools.

name: In-Tray Exercise
description: A simulated assessment exercise requiring candidates to manage a realistic set of work items (emails, memos, reports) under time pressure. Evaluates prioritisation, decision-making, and written communication.

name: Interactive Manager Assessment
description: A work-simulation assessment for managerial candidates involving realistic scenarios that measure leadership, delegation, communication, and decision-making competencies.

name: Personality and Preference Inventory (PAPI)
description: A widely used work personality questionnaire measuring 20 need and role scales based on Murray's Need Theory. Available in both normative and ipsative formats. Covers working styles, motivators, and leadership orientation.

name: ADEPT-15
description: Measures 15 key personality traits relevant to the workplace, covering managing work, managing people, managing emotion, and managing energy. Concise and highly predictive of job performance.

name: Remote Worker Assessment
description: Designed to assess suitability for remote and hybrid work. Measures self-motivation, time management, communication, and technology comfort in an unmanaged environment.

name: Data Entry 7.0
description: Measures speed and accuracy of entering alphanumeric data through a simulated data-entry task. Ideal for administrative, back-office, and data-processing roles.

name: Typing Skills Assessment
description: Measures typing speed (WPM) and accuracy. Suitable for secretarial, administrative, transcription, and data entry roles.

name: Portfolio Manager - Sales Simulation
description: A simulation for experienced sales roles requiring candidates to manage a client portfolio, respond to client needs, and prioritise sales actions under realistic business conditions.

name: Mechanical Comprehension - Basic
description: A basic-level mechanical comprehension test for operative and trade roles. Covers levers, pulleys, gears, and basic physical principles without advanced mathematics.

name: Graduate 8.0 - Management
description: An ability assessment battery tailored for management trainee and MBA-level candidates. Tests higher-order verbal, numerical, and analytical reasoning.

name: Technology Graduate Battery
description: A tailored battery of cognitive assessments for technology graduates combining numerical, inductive, and spatial reasoning to predict success in technical roles.

name: Financial Planning & Analysis Skills
description: Assesses knowledge of financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis. Suitable for FP&A, finance business partner, and finance analyst roles.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Tests knowledge of project management methodologies including PMBOK, risk management, scope definition, and stakeholder communication. Suitable for PM and PMO roles.

name: Managerial and Professional Assessment (MAP)
description: A comprehensive battery for managerial and senior professional assessment combining cognitive ability with personality profiling for leadership roles.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32n)
description: The normative form of the OPQ, providing scores relative to a comparison group. Measures 32 personality scales. Best used when norm-referenced interpretation is required.

name: Smart Interview Live
description: A structured competency-based live interview platform using AI to provide structured question frameworks and scoring guidance. Ensures fair, consistent, and defensible interviews.

name: Smart Interview On-demand
description: An automated on-demand video interview tool where candidates respond to structured questions on their own time. AI-scoring assists in ranking candidates efficiently at scale.

name: Microsoft Office Specialist Assessment
description: Tests proficiency across Microsoft Office applications including Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook through realistic task simulations.

name: Excel (Advanced)
description: Assesses advanced Excel skills including complex formulas, pivot tables, VBA macros, data validation, and financial modelling. Suited for data analysts, finance professionals, and operations roles.

name: Occupational Health and Safety
description: Knowledge test covering occupational health and safety regulations, hazard identification, risk assessment, and safe working practices. Suitable for safety-critical industries.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, containerisation, infrastructure as code, monitoring, and cloud operations. For DevOps engineer roles.

name: Cloud Computing (AWS)
description: Tests knowledge of Amazon Web Services including EC2, S3, IAM, Lambda, VPC, and cloud architecture best practices. Designed for cloud engineer and architect roles.

name: Cyber Security (New)
description: Evaluates knowledge of cybersecurity concepts including threat modelling, encryption, network security, incident response, and compliance frameworks. For security analyst and engineer roles.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of data science concepts including statistics, machine learning algorithms, data wrangling, model evaluation, and Python/R usage. For data scientist roles.

name: Business Analyst Skills
description: Tests business analysis competencies including requirements gathering, process mapping, stakeholder management, and agile BA practices. Suitable for BA and product owner roles.

name: Numerical Critical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to interpret and critically evaluate complex numerical information. Calibrated for senior executive and MBA-level candidates.

name: Verbal Critical Reasoning
description: Assesses higher-order verbal reasoning including identifying assumptions, evaluating arguments, and drawing conclusions from complex text. Suitable for senior and executive roles.
